title: arenaria capillaris var. nardifolia
intro: Arenaria capillaris var. nardifolia, also known as Sea Pink or Sea Spurrey, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is a low-growing, succulent perennial with pink or white flowers that are rich in antioxidants and have been used for their medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been linked to several health benefits, including wound healing, skin protection, and the reduction of inflammation and oxidative stress. Arenaria capillaris var. nardifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, and is also used in herbal infusions and skincare products to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
